channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Parking on pavement, 15th May
item.description:
This lazy driver had no regards of concerns for pedestrians… because he wanted to deliver items for his new flat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various Flytipping in Hayles St. near Hedger St., 15th May
item.description:
Paint pots and black sack full of polystyrene reported and not FIXED. Now more stuff added. The welcome home box is addressed to 3 Hedger St. The suitcase belongs to someone in Northwood. Also pieces of kitchen worktop. Something needs to be done about persistent flytipping at this spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elliott's Row, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture left on street, 15th May
item.description:
Has been left out for several weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again, 15th May
item.description:
Again more fly tipping at this corner Linden Grove /wTer Mews, Southwark by Nunhead Cemetery. It is getting worse daily as people keep adding to it! Please clean it up and put a camera there as it is weekly now! I pass in front of this daily by bike on my way to work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Water Mews, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Woolwich new rd, 15th May
item.description:
Outside old gunpit pub. Pavement has been damaged by scaffolding. Numerous circular holes in paving, filling with water. Damage caused by building work, cost of repair should be recouped from landlord.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beresford Square, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on at end of road, 15th May
item.description:
Pothole has been there for a while and is getting bigger and bigger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking in a cycle bay, 15th May
item.description:
I am concerned one of the cycle bay posts has been knocked down and is on the pavement and the car us parked in the cycle bay

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement of Kilburn high street leading to springfield lane, 15th May
item.description:
The concrete of the slanted edge of the pavement/ road is very slippery and has no grip at all, I cycle on it everyday to access Springfield road I have fallen twice of my bike even at walking pace and have now broken ribs. This spot is dangerous thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springfield Lane, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked fully on pavement, 15th May
item.description:
Car parked fully on pavement out side no 22 so everyone has to go into the road to get passed it is a danger to people with prams and visual problems. This is the second time I have reported this. Reg number of car is BB64 KXP
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenhithe Close, Sidcup
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damages/ Bent camera pole, 15th May
item.description:
Damaged/ Bent pole with an enforcement camera attached to it ( obviously it must have a live power wires) and if it's on an angle the camera may not work properly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavement is becoming inaccessible due to hedge overgrowth from house, 15th May
item.description:
The hedge is overhanging the pavement by a huge amount, and this is directly in front of a utilities cupboard making the pavement space too small for a buggy to get through without getting caught on the hedge. Please take measures to either cut down the hedge on the property or enforce that the owner does this themselves.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amesbury Avenue, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees all overgrown, 15th May
item.description:
The trees kent house station end are all overgrown and now starting to obstruct cars and pavement users there is one that is growimg up the side of a house onto a residential property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture and fridge freezer, 15th May
item.description:
Chest of drawers been there for over 1 months I previously reported this and nothing was done. Now a large fridge freezer as been dumped along side it. The chest of drawers came from 98 cumbrian avenue. The fridge came from one of the flats. Both are obstructing the pavement. Children play in this area it is dangerous to them if they climb on it or it falls on them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumbrian Avenue, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole street has a stench of urine, 15th May
item.description:
This road is used by drug dealers and takers and the frequenters of Bet Fred, as their personal toilet. The whole road is disgusting and needs disinfecting. This is a hazard to human health. Please urgently clean down the street and take proactive measures to prevent this behaviour.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barrhill Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 15th May
item.description:
We cleaned the street AGAIn! And these bags on various locations down our road have now been here a week outside no 9 and on the pavement opposite

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge fallen branches, 15th May
item.description:
Hi my name is Taoulant Tzatzo I live in Bexleyheath 127D Upton Road and we are neighbours on the back garden with the property on 104 Lion Road. They have 3 maybe 4 (Very large) trees on their side and there branches keep breaking and falling on our garden. We have two kids that play often outside, and we are afraid of their safety and ours. Two days ago a big branch fell next to my wife when she was cleaning outside. This is the second time i m reporting this matter, I reported this matter a year ago when another huge branch fallen and it broke our window. Please help us resolved this matter ASAP , we want to know what needs to be done?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lion Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised manhole., 15th May
item.description:
Manhole is raised, rd surface uneven and hole now developing by manhole
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melbourne Grove (near benches) broken glass on road, 15th May
item.description:
Broken Glass on the road needs removing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Everyday fly tipping - Mattress fly tipped, 15th May
item.description:
I’m sorry to report again but it’s literally insane. No 11/13 Nelgarde rd are dumping stuff all over the pavement pretty much everyday. Can someone please approach the landlord and do something. It’s beyond grim and is attracting rodents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25 Fordwych Road, 15th May
item.description:
This pothole has been a serious problem since February. It has been reported multiple times, including under reference 8995687. Today, it has falsely been marked as fixed on both the outstanding reports. No work had been done and it remains a serious hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Fordwych Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
